title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 15 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 15 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 15 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today, the main contract closed 834. an increase of 1.03% throughout the day; some traders accordingto market conditions. Steel mills mainly adopt a wait-and-see approach, with fewer inquiries.
